ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "receipt_id" INTEGER /* Receipt ID for the sales transaction */,
  "tx_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales transaction */,
  "tx_no" INTEGER /* Transaction number */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who handled the transaction */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "item_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the item */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store location */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store location */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in the store */,
  "restock_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for restocking the product */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the customer */,
  "tier" TEXT /* Loyalty tier of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_history" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales transaction */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount spent in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales transaction */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "processed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_processed_by FOREIGN KEY ("processed_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales transaction */,
  "exchange_date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the exchange */,
  "new_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new product exchanged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchanges_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchanges_new_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the employee works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)
